steps.name: Mustard Seed
steps.provenance_note: Re-sourced directly from the live Claude Design canvas (file v173, updated 2026-06-02T20:07:33Z; captured 2026-06-03). Markup pulled via OmeletteService/GetFile (source-of-truth sha adf95da7); brain assets/mustard-brain-approved-tan-600x873.png sha 8ed19f11 + all 7 Klaviyo-CDN images verified byte-for-byte against the live canvas, then inlined via flatten_claude_export.py (all fidelity gates passed). ROOT CAUSE: live canvas, Theo's export 18c546, and prior flatten 34f89e all carry the IDENTICAL brain (8ed19f11) and identical brain-cell CSS (height:873px; background-size:600px auto; position center top); this render is pixel-identical (0.0000%) to 34f89e. The cream arch is image-borne in 8ed19f11 and renders correctly. Prior export was faithful, NOT divergent; re-sourced to anchor provenance to the live canvas as the standard source step.
